ai_model_descriptions.Random Forest: An ensemble learning method that operates by constructing multiple decision trees.
ai_model_descriptions.XGBoost: A scalable tree boosting system that uses gradient boosting framework.
ai_model_descriptions.SVM: Support Vector Machines are supervised learning models used for classification and regression analysis.
ai_model_descriptions.Neural Network: A series of algorithms that attempts to recognize underlying relationships in a set of data through a process that mimics how the human brain operates.
ai_model_descriptions.ResNet18: 18-layer residual network for image classification with skip connections.
ai_model_descriptions.ResNet50: 50-layer residual network, deeper variant for higher accuracy.
ai_model_descriptions.MobileNetV2: Lightweight CNN for mobile and edge deployment.
ai_model_descriptions.EfficientNet_B0: EfficientNet balances depth, width, and resolution for better accuracy-efficiency tradeoff.
ai_model_descriptions.ViT_Base: Vision Transformer applies transformer architecture to image patches.
ai_model_descriptions.DenseNet121: Densely connected convolutional network with feature reuse.
ai_model_descriptions.InceptionV3: Inception architecture with optimized Inception modules.
ai_model_descriptions.VGG16: 16-layer VGG network with simple 3x3 convolutional blocks.
ai_model_descriptions.SimpleCNN: Lightweight convolutional neural network for image classification.
ai_model_descriptions.ShuffleNetV2: Efficient architecture using channel shuffle operations.
ai_model_descriptions.BERT_base: Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers for NLP.
ai_model_descriptions.DistilBERT: Distilled BERT with fewer parameters and faster inference.
ai_model_descriptions.ALBERT: A Lite BERT with parameter sharing for efficiency.
ai_model_descriptions.LSTM: Long Short-Term Memory network for sequential data.
ai_model_descriptions.CNN_Text: Convolutional neural network for text classification.
ai_model_descriptions.Transformer_small: Small transformer model for text tasks.
ai_model_descriptions.GPT2_small: Generative pre-trained transformer for text generation and understanding.
ai_model_descriptions.ELECTRA: Efficiently learning an encoder that classifies token replacements.
ai_model_descriptions.LSTM_TS: LSTM for time series forecasting and classification.
ai_model_descriptions.GRU_TS: Gated Recurrent Unit for time series modeling.
ai_model_descriptions.TCN: Temporal Convolutional Network for sequence modeling.
ai_model_descriptions.XGBoost_TS: XGBoost applied to time series features.
ai_model_descriptions.RandomForest_TS: Random Forest for time series classification.
